falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 Index rises by 10% from its current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp and sustained upward move would contradict the pattern's expectation of a bottom, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: An elevated blowoff score indicates extreme selling pressure, which would refute the current HOLD signal by suggesting a deeper correction is imminent.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces an unexpected 50-basis-point rate cut within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such intervention would inject liquidity and counteract bearish momentum, directly contradicting the pattern's implied market dynamics.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
